summary: ORBITAL Trading Platform - Profile, KYC, Admin Features Testing Complete. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working: Profile page with edit functionality, KYC verification section, Deposit page with crypto QR codes (BTC, ETH, USDT, LTC, SOL), Withdraw page with demo account blocking, Admin panel with all tabs (Overview, Users, Withdrawals, Broadcast, Promotions). Mobile responsive design verified.

backend: GET /api/user/profile - returns full user data with kyc_status
PATCH /api/user/profile - updates user fields (full_name, phone, country)
POST /api/user/kyc/upload - rejects invalid document types with 400
POST /api/admin/broadcast - sends notification to all users
POST /api/admin/broadcast - requires admin privileges (403 for regular users)
GET /api/admin/users - returns paginated user list {users: [...], total, page, pages}
frontend: Profile page loads with user info, account details, and KYC section
Profile page Edit Profile button enables form editing
Profile page Save Profile button appears when editing
KYC Verification section shows status (VERIFIED/PENDING)
KYC upload buttons present for non-verified users (hidden when verified)
Deposit page loads with crypto QR code
Deposit page crypto selector shows BTC, ETH, USDT, LTC, SOL options
Deposit page copy-address button works
Deposit page wallet address displayed correctly
Withdraw page shows crypto-only withdrawal form
Withdraw page wallet address input present
Withdraw page submit button present
Withdraw page blocks demo account users with message
Admin panel Overview tab shows stats (Total Users, Active Trades, Volume, Revenue)
Admin panel Overview tab shows Recent Users table
Admin panel Users tab shows search input
Admin panel Users tab shows user cards with Suspend/Adjust buttons
Admin panel Withdrawals tab shows withdrawal table
Admin panel Broadcast tab sends messages successfully
Admin panel Promotions tab creates and lists promotions
Navbar has Profile icon link that navigates to /profile
Mobile responsive design working correctly
Mobile menu shows all navigation links

critical_code_review_comments: All new features implemented correctly and working as expected
Profile page properly shows KYC status and hides upload buttons when verified
Deposit page QR codes generated via external API (api.qrserver.com) - MOCKED crypto addresses
Withdraw page correctly blocks demo users with clear message
Admin panel properly handles paginated user response {users: [...], total, page, pages}
Mobile responsive design implemented with hamburger menu
seed_data_creation: Using pre-seeded admin and master user accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (Profile, KYC, Deposit, Withdraw, Admin panel) are working correctly. Login requires: 1) Fill email/password, 2) Double-click [data-testid='slide-verify'], 3) Click 'Access Platform'. Admin user has is_admin=true. Master user is in demo mode by default. KYC upload buttons only show for non-verified users. Crypto wallet addresses are MOCKED sample addresses.

mocked_apis.note: Crypto wallet addresses are sample addresses. QR codes generated via external API (api.qrserver.com). No real blockchain integration. Crypto deposits and withdrawals are placeholder processing.

feature_verification.profile_page: VERIFIED - Shows user info, account details, KYC status, edit functionality
feature_verification.kyc_upload: VERIFIED - Upload buttons present for non-verified users, hidden when verified
feature_verification.deposit_page: VERIFIED - Crypto QR codes with BTC, ETH, USDT, LTC, SOL options
feature_verification.withdraw_page: VERIFIED - Crypto-only withdrawal form, demo account blocking
feature_verification.admin_overview: VERIFIED - Stats and recent users table
feature_verification.admin_users: VERIFIED - Search, user cards, Suspend/Adjust buttons
feature_verification.admin_broadcast: VERIFIED - Send broadcast to all users
feature_verification.mobile_responsive: VERIFIED - Hamburger menu, proper layout on mobile
